notes: The visible library was rebuilt after removing legacy duplicates and incomplete translations.
Every article includes source-grounded highlights and complete Simplified Chinese and English display fields.
Historical URL and title identities remain in data/seen-articles.json to prevent removed items from returning.

articles.title: Rep. Ro Khanna on being detained by Israeli settlers in the West Bank
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: 罗·卡纳称，以色列定居者和士兵在约旦河西岸暂时扣留了他的访问团。
articles.summary: 美国众议员罗·卡纳接受 NPR 采访，讲述其团队在约旦河西岸访问时被定居者拦截、随后又被士兵暂时限制离开的经历。事件把定居者暴力、军方执法与美国对以政策同时推到台前。
articles.failureAnalysis: 卡纳与以色列军方对士兵是否参与阻拦的说法存在分歧；判断后续影响要看独立影像、正式调查以及是否有人被追责。
articles.sourceExcerpt: NPR's Ailsa Chang speaks with Rep. Ro Khanna about his recent trip to the occupied West Bank and temporary detention by Israeli settlers and soldiers.

zh.title: 美国议员罗·卡纳讲述约旦河西岸被扣经历
zh.highlight: 罗·卡纳称，以色列定居者和士兵在约旦河西岸暂时扣留了他的访问团。
zh.summary: 美国众议员罗·卡纳接受 NPR 采访，讲述其团队在约旦河西岸访问时被定居者拦截、随后又被士兵暂时限制离开的经历。事件把定居者暴力、军方执法与美国对以政策同时推到台前。
zh.failureAnalysis: 卡纳与以色列军方对士兵是否参与阻拦的说法存在分歧；判断后续影响要看独立影像、正式调查以及是否有人被追责。

en.title: Ro Khanna recounts detention during a West Bank visit
en.highlight: Ro Khanna described how settlers and soldiers temporarily detained his delegation in the occupied West Bank.
en.summary: Representative Ro Khanna told NPR that settlers blocked his delegation during a West Bank visit and soldiers then delayed their departure. The incident raises questions about settler violence, military conduct, and U.S. policy toward Israel.
en.failureAnalysis: Khanna and the Israeli military dispute the soldiers' role. Independent footage, an official investigation, and accountability will determine the broader significance.

articles.title: Derision at US chain Chipotle’s plan to sell its Mexican food in Mexico
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: 大胆啊——把企业版的墨西哥菜卖回墨西哥。
articles.summary: Chipotle 将在蒙特雷开出墨西哥首店，却因把美式墨西哥餐卖回原产文化市场而遭遇嘲讽与质疑。它既是一次跨境扩张，也是品牌能否把标准化体验与本地饮食认同重新对齐的压力测试。
articles.failureAnalysis: Taco Bell 等美国连锁在墨西哥的失败先例说明，熟悉的品类不等于可接受的品牌。首店客流之外，更应观察复购率、本地供应链和墨西哥城扩张是否兑现。
articles.sourceExcerpt: A US chain’s plan to sell its version of Mexican food to Mexicans has prompted bemusement, skepticism and anger among local people.

zh.title: Chipotle 首进墨西哥，当地人先泼冷水
zh.highlight: 大胆啊——把企业版的墨西哥菜卖回墨西哥。
zh.summary: Chipotle 将在蒙特雷开出墨西哥首店，却因把美式墨西哥餐卖回原产文化市场而遭遇嘲讽与质疑。它既是一次跨境扩张，也是品牌能否把标准化体验与本地饮食认同重新对齐的压力测试。
zh.failureAnalysis: Taco Bell 等美国连锁在墨西哥的失败先例说明，熟悉的品类不等于可接受的品牌。首店客流之外，更应观察复购率、本地供应链和墨西哥城扩张是否兑现。

en.title: Chipotle enters Mexico and meets immediate skepticism
en.highlight: Bold move selling Mexico a corporate version of Mexico.
en.summary: Chipotle is opening its first Mexican location in Monterrey, prompting both curiosity and ridicule over selling an Americanized version of Mexican food in Mexico. The launch tests whether a standardized global brand can earn local cultural acceptance.
en.failureAnalysis: Past failures by U.S. chains show that category familiarity does not guarantee brand fit. Repeat visits, local sourcing, and expansion beyond the first store matter more than launch attention.

articles.title: People watching the World Cup during work hours is leading to a drop in productivity
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: 一项调查称，世界杯热潮正让全球经济承受工作效率下降的代价。
articles.summary: NPR 以调查和小企业主的经历观察世界杯比赛落在工作时段时造成的注意力转移。它提醒管理者，全球同步的大型文化事件会在短期内改变出勤、排班与实际产出。
articles.failureAnalysis: 生产力损失来自调查估算和个案，难以精确归因；更有价值的比较是弹性排班、集体观赛与强行禁看分别带来的成本。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The global economy may be suffering from lost productivity as people get swept by World Cup fever, a survey shows.

zh.title: 世界杯撞上工作时间，全球生产力正在掉线
zh.highlight: 一项调查称，世界杯热潮正让全球经济承受工作效率下降的代价。
zh.summary: NPR 以调查和小企业主的经历观察世界杯比赛落在工作时段时造成的注意力转移。它提醒管理者，全球同步的大型文化事件会在短期内改变出勤、排班与实际产出。
zh.failureAnalysis: 生产力损失来自调查估算和个案，难以精确归因；更有价值的比较是弹性排班、集体观赛与强行禁看分别带来的成本。

en.title: World Cup viewing during work hours dents productivity
en.highlight: A survey suggests World Cup fever is reducing productivity across the global economy.
en.summary: NPR uses survey findings and a small-business example to examine how daytime World Cup matches divert attention from work. The story shows how synchronized cultural events can alter attendance, scheduling, and output.
en.failureAnalysis: The loss is based on survey estimates and anecdotes rather than clean causal measurement. Flexible scheduling and coordinated viewing should be compared with outright restrictions.

articles.title: alibaba/open-code-review
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: 它把文件筛选、代码分组和评论定位交给确定性流程，把动态判断留给智能体。
articles.summary: Open Code Review 源自阿里内部工具，把确定性的文件覆盖、规则匹配和评论定位，与可检索上下文的 LLM 智能体组合起来。它关注的不是
articles.failureAnalysis: 真正门槛仍是模型成本、私有代码合规和团队规则维护。项目宣称的大规模内部效果需要公开基准、误报率和跨语言数据进一步验证。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The tool combines deterministic engineering with an agent: hard constraints cover file selection, bundling, rule matching and positioning, while the agent handles dynamic decisions.

zh.title: 阿里开源 AI 代码审查：把流程确定性还给工程
zh.highlight: 它把文件筛选、代码分组和评论定位交给确定性流程，把动态判断留给智能体。
zh.summary: Open Code Review 源自阿里内部工具，把确定性的文件覆盖、规则匹配和评论定位，与可检索上下文的 LLM 智能体组合起来。它关注的不是
zh.failureAnalysis: 真正门槛仍是模型成本、私有代码合规和团队规则维护。项目宣称的大规模内部效果需要公开基准、误报率和跨语言数据进一步验证。

en.title: Alibaba open-sources a deterministic-plus-agent code reviewer
en.highlight: Deterministic pipelines handle coverage and positioning while an agent performs dynamic reasoning and context retrieval.
en.summary: Open Code Review combines deterministic file selection, rule matching, and comment positioning with an LLM agent that can retrieve repository context. Its goal is stable coverage and accurate line-level feedback on large changesets.
en.failureAnalysis: Adoption still depends on model cost, private-code compliance, and rule maintenance. Public benchmarks for false positives, language coverage, and the claimed internal scale remain important.

articles.title: omnigent-ai/omnigent
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: 同一层可组合 Claude Code、Codex 与自定义智能体，并用策略、沙箱和共享会话约束它们。
articles.summary: Omnigent 试图成为编程智能体之上的通用运行层：不同工具可以互换或组合，会话能够跨终端和网页共享，权限与成本则由状态化策略控制。它回应的是团队同时使用多种智能体后出现的治理和协作碎片化。
articles.failureAnalysis: 项目仍处于 alpha，统一抽象可能跟不上各家智能体快速变化的能力边界。沙箱安全、凭据代理和跨工具会话一致性需要独立安全审计与长期稳定性数据。
articles.sourceExcerpt: A common layer over Claude Code, Codex, Pi, and custom agents lets users swap or combine harnesses, enforce policies and sandboxing, and collaborate in the same live session.

zh.title: Omnigent：给不同编程智能体加一层统一控制台
zh.highlight: 同一层可组合 Claude Code、Codex 与自定义智能体，并用策略、沙箱和共享会话约束它们。
zh.summary: Omnigent 试图成为编程智能体之上的通用运行层：不同工具可以互换或组合，会话能够跨终端和网页共享，权限与成本则由状态化策略控制。它回应的是团队同时使用多种智能体后出现的治理和协作碎片化。
zh.failureAnalysis: 项目仍处于 alpha，统一抽象可能跟不上各家智能体快速变化的能力边界。沙箱安全、凭据代理和跨工具会话一致性需要独立安全审计与长期稳定性数据。

en.title: Omnigent adds a shared control layer above coding agents
en.highlight: One layer composes Claude Code, Codex, and custom agents while enforcing policies, sandboxing, and shared sessions.
en.summary: Omnigent positions itself as a common runtime above multiple coding-agent harnesses, with interchangeable tools, shared live sessions, and stateful controls for permissions and spending. It targets the governance fragmentation created by multi-agent teams.
en.failureAnalysis: The project is still alpha, and a common abstraction may lag rapidly changing agent capabilities. Sandbox security, credential brokering, and cross-tool session consistency need independent audits and operational evidence.

articles.title: DBNN: Neural Spike Classification Using a Deep Binarized Neural Network
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: DBNN 在合成与活体数据上达到 98.7% 中位准确率，ASIC 估算功耗仅 122 纳瓦。
articles.summary: 论文为植入式脑机接口设计了硬件导向的深度二值神经网络，在设备端完成神经脉冲分类。它用很小的输入和无乘法器计算换取 98.7% 的中位准确率，并给出 FPGA 与 ASIC 的完整实现数据。
articles.failureAnalysis: 结果来自合成和活体数据集及综合估算，尚不等于长期植入人体后的稳定功耗与准确率。电极漂移、组织变化和芯片制造后的实测仍是关键验证。
articles.sourceExcerpt: The classifier achieves 98.7% median accuracy; ASIC synthesis estimates 0.014 mm2 and 122 nW at 20 kHz with multiplier-free operation.

zh.title: 无乘法器神经网络把植入式脑机接口降到 122 纳瓦
zh.highlight: DBNN 在合成与活体数据上达到 98.7% 中位准确率，ASIC 估算功耗仅 122 纳瓦。
zh.summary: 论文为植入式脑机接口设计了硬件导向的深度二值神经网络，在设备端完成神经脉冲分类。它用很小的输入和无乘法器计算换取 98.7% 的中位准确率，并给出 FPGA 与 ASIC 的完整实现数据。
zh.failureAnalysis: 结果来自合成和活体数据集及综合估算，尚不等于长期植入人体后的稳定功耗与准确率。电极漂移、组织变化和芯片制造后的实测仍是关键验证。

paperCard.problem: 植入式脑机接口需要在设备端完成神经脉冲分类，否则原始数据传输会消耗大量带宽和电能。
paperCard.method: 使用两个 256 神经元的二值隐藏层和定点输出层，在 16 个采样点的短波形上完成无乘法器分类。
paperCard.difference: 相较依赖浮点乘法和更长波形的网络，它把核心计算压缩成符号控制累加与位逻辑。
paperCard.innovation: 把深度二值神经网络真正落到 FPGA 与 45 纳米 ASIC 流程，并同时报告准确率、面积、延迟和功耗。
paperCard.implementation: FPGA 原型以 50 MHz 运行，每个脉冲 528 个周期；ASIC 综合估算面积 0.014 平方毫米，在 20 kHz、1.1 V 下功耗 122 纳瓦。
paperCard.applications: 低功耗植入式脑机接口、闭环神经刺激和长期神经记录设备。
technicalTerms: 脉冲分类：把不同神经元产生的电信号波形分开
二值神经网络：权重或激活主要使用一位表示
ASIC：为固定任务定制的集成电路

en.title: A multiplier-free spike sorter reaches 122 nW for implantable BCIs
en.highlight: DBNN reaches 98.7% median accuracy and an estimated 122 nW ASIC power budget.
en.summary: The paper presents a hardware-oriented deep binarized neural network for on-device spike sorting in implantable BCIs. Compact inputs and multiplier-free inference deliver 98.7% median accuracy with FPGA and ASIC implementation results.
en.failureAnalysis: Synthetic and in-vivo datasets plus synthesis estimates do not establish long-term implanted performance. Electrode drift, tissue changes, and fabricated-chip measurements remain essential.

paperCard.problem: Implantable BCIs need on-device neural spike classification to avoid costly raw-data telemetry.
paperCard.method: Two 256-neuron binarized hidden layers and a fixed-point output layer classify compact 16-sample waveforms without multipliers.
paperCard.difference: Unlike floating-point networks using longer inputs, computation is reduced to sign-controlled accumulation and bit logic.
paperCard.innovation: The design is implemented in both FPGA and 45 nm ASIC flows with accuracy, area, latency, and power reported together.
paperCard.implementation: The 50 MHz FPGA takes 528 cycles per spike; ASIC synthesis estimates 0.014 mm2 and 122 nW at 20 kHz and 1.1 V.
paperCard.applications: Low-power implantable BCIs, closed-loop neural stimulation, and long-term neural recording.
technicalTerms: Spike sorting: separating waveforms produced by different neurons
BNN: a neural network using mostly one-bit weights or activations
ASIC: a chip customized for a fixed task

paperCard.problem: 植入式脑机接口需要在设备端完成神经脉冲分类，否则原始数据传输会消耗大量带宽和电能。
paperCard.method: 使用两个 256 神经元的二值隐藏层和定点输出层，在 16 个采样点的短波形上完成无乘法器分类。
paperCard.difference: 相较依赖浮点乘法和更长波形的网络，它把核心计算压缩成符号控制累加与位逻辑。
paperCard.innovation: 把深度二值神经网络真正落到 FPGA 与 45 纳米 ASIC 流程，并同时报告准确率、面积、延迟和功耗。
paperCard.implementation: FPGA 原型以 50 MHz 运行，每个脉冲 528 个周期；ASIC 综合估算面积 0.014 平方毫米，在 20 kHz、1.1 V 下功耗 122 纳瓦。
paperCard.applications: 低功耗植入式脑机接口、闭环神经刺激和长期神经记录设备。
technicalTerms: 脉冲分类：把不同神经元产生的电信号波形分开
二值神经网络：权重或激活主要使用一位表示
ASIC：为固定任务定制的集成电路

articles.title: BrainJanus: A Unified Model for Understanding and Generation across Brain, Vision, and Language
articles.selectionReason: Fresh, openly readable, source-grounded, and not present in the historical identity ledger.
articles.highlight: 统一脑信号分词器把连续神经活动映射到共享空间，支持脑信号与图像、文本之间的任意方向生成。
articles.summary: BrainJanus 把脑信号、视觉和语言放入同一个离散表示空间，用一个自回归架构同时完成刺激到脑活动的编码和脑活动到图像、文本的解码。它试图把以往割裂的脑科学任务变成可共享表示的通用模型。
articles.failureAnalysis: 统一模型的优势来自多项基准，仍需检查跨受试者、跨设备和真实临床环境的稳定性。脑信号隐私、训练数据规模与生成结果被过度解读也是部署风险。
articles.sourceExcerpt: BrainJanus introduces a Unified Brain Tokenizer and an all-in-one autoregressive architecture for image-to-brain, text-to-brain, brain-to-image, and brain-to-text generation.

zh.title: BrainJanus 让大脑、视觉与语言在一个模型里双向转换
zh.highlight: 统一脑信号分词器把连续神经活动映射到共享空间，支持脑信号与图像、文本之间的任意方向生成。
zh.summary: BrainJanus 把脑信号、视觉和语言放入同一个离散表示空间，用一个自回归架构同时完成刺激到脑活动的编码和脑活动到图像、文本的解码。它试图把以往割裂的脑科学任务变成可共享表示的通用模型。
zh.failureAnalysis: 统一模型的优势来自多项基准，仍需检查跨受试者、跨设备和真实临床环境的稳定性。脑信号隐私、训练数据规模与生成结果被过度解读也是部署风险。

paperCard.problem: 过去的大脑编码和解码通常分开训练，也很少在同一空间里联合处理脑信号、图像与语言。
paperCard.method: 先用统一脑信号分词器把连续神经活动离散化，再用自回归模型通过下一个 token 预测完成任意方向生成。
paperCard.difference: 它不再分别维护图像到脑、脑到文本等单任务模型，而是在共享 Omni 空间里统一训练。
paperCard.innovation: 首次把大脑、视觉和语言的编码与生成整合为一个任意到任意框架，并报告零样本泛化与可解释脑区拓扑。
paperCard.implementation: 把神经动态量化为与视觉、语言对齐的离散 token，再用统一自回归架构处理图像到脑、文本到脑、脑到图像和脑到文本。
paperCard.applications: 脑信号解释、视觉刺激重建、辅助交流和跨模态神经科学研究。
technicalTerms: 脑信号分词器：把连续神经活动转换为离散符号
自回归：根据已有 token 逐步预测下一个 token
零样本泛化：不针对新任务再训练也能完成推断

en.title: BrainJanus unifies brain, vision, and language generation
en.highlight: A unified brain tokenizer supports generation between neural activity, images, and text in every direction.
en.summary: BrainJanus places brain signals, vision, and language in one discrete representation space and uses a single autoregressive architecture for both neural encoding and decoding. It reframes isolated neuroscience tasks as a shared generative model.
en.failureAnalysis: Benchmark gains still need validation across subjects, devices, and clinical conditions. Neural privacy, dataset scale, and overinterpretation of generated outputs are major deployment risks.

paperCard.problem: Brain encoding and decoding are usually trained separately and rarely align neural activity, images, and language in one space.
paperCard.method: A unified tokenizer discretizes neural dynamics, then an autoregressive model performs any-to-any generation by next-token prediction.
paperCard.difference: Instead of separate image-to-brain or brain-to-text models, all directions share one Omni representation and architecture.
paperCard.innovation: The work unifies brain, vision, and language generation while reporting zero-shot generalization and interpretable neural topography.
paperCard.implementation: Neural dynamics become discrete tokens aligned with visual and language tokens, supporting image-to-brain, text-to-brain, brain-to-image, and brain-to-text tasks.
paperCard.applications: Brain-signal interpretation, visual reconstruction, assistive communication, and multimodal neuroscience.
technicalTerms: Brain tokenizer: converts continuous neural activity into discrete symbols
Autoregressive model: predicts the next token from prior tokens
Zero-shot generalization: performs a new task without task-specific retraining

paperCard.problem: 过去的大脑编码和解码通常分开训练，也很少在同一空间里联合处理脑信号、图像与语言。
paperCard.method: 先用统一脑信号分词器把连续神经活动离散化，再用自回归模型通过下一个 token 预测完成任意方向生成。
paperCard.difference: 它不再分别维护图像到脑、脑到文本等单任务模型，而是在共享 Omni 空间里统一训练。
paperCard.innovation: 首次把大脑、视觉和语言的编码与生成整合为一个任意到任意框架，并报告零样本泛化与可解释脑区拓扑。
paperCard.implementation: 把神经动态量化为与视觉、语言对齐的离散 token，再用统一自回归架构处理图像到脑、文本到脑、脑到图像和脑到文本。
paperCard.applications: 脑信号解释、视觉刺激重建、辅助交流和跨模态神经科学研究。
technicalTerms: 脑信号分词器：把连续神经活动转换为离散符号
自回归：根据已有 token 逐步预测下一个 token
零样本泛化：不针对新任务再训练也能完成推断
